Interface IMemoryRelationshipClassName

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that define a memory relationship class name.

[Guid("91DBC553-EB2D-11D3-9F84-00C04F6BC886")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IMemoryRelationshipClassName

Properties

BackwardPathLabel

The back label of the relationship.

string BackwardPathLabel { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DestinationName

The name object of the destination class of the memory relationship.

IName DestinationName { get; set; }

Property Value

IName

Sample Snippet

ForwardPathLabel

The forward label of the relationship.

string ForwardPathLabel { get; set; }

string

OriginForeignKey

Origin foreign key field name.

string OriginForeignKey { get; set; }

string

OriginName

The name object for the origin table of the memory relationship.

IName OriginName { get; set; }

IName

OriginPrimaryKey

Origin primary key field name.

string OriginPrimaryKey { get; set; }
